help_command.stdout:
usage: ctcp_orchestrate.py [-h]
                           {agent-manifest,agent-scaffold,agent-project,new-run,status,advance,cos-user-v2p,scaffold,scaffold-pointcloud} ...

CTCP local orchestrator (artifact-driven state machine)

positional arguments:
  {agent-manifest,agent-scaffold,agent-project,new-run,status,advance,cos-user-v2p,scaffold,scaffold-pointcloud}
    agent-manifest      Generate an agent manifest through the isolated mode
    agent-scaffold      Generate a runnable local deterministic scaffold from
                        an agent manifest
    agent-project       Generate an end-to-end dry-run agent project from a
                        requirement input
    new-run             Create a new external run directory
    status              Show current gate and missing artifact
    advance             Advance one-or-more steps by artifact presence
    cos-user-v2p        Run external V2P testkit with CTCP dialogue, evidence
                        and fixed destination copy
    scaffold            Generate a reference CTCP project skeleton
    scaffold-pointcloud
                        Generate a point-cloud project scaffold from templates

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit

commands.cmd: D:\.c_projects\adc\ctcp\.venv\Scripts\python.exe D:\.c_projects\adc\ctcp\scripts\ctcp_orchestrate.py new-run --goal Generate a real runnable local HTTP API project for tracking issues. The project must not be an agent manifest, agent scaffold, or agent dry-run. It must be a concrete software project with README, source code, automated tests, and SQLite persistence. Required endpoints: POST /issues, GET /issues, GET /issues/{id}, PATCH /issues/{id}/status, POST /issues/{id}/close. Use SQLite persistence. Valid issue statuses: open, in_progress, closed. Generate the concrete project files, tests, README, runnable local HTTP server, and delivery package. --run-id concrete-issue-tracker-1779094244

analysis_progress.output_contract:
# Analysis

## Project Type
One short paragraph naming the concrete software project type.

## Required Files
Bullets for the minimum files/directories the later source_generation step must create.

## Runtime
Bullets for entrypoint, HTTP/server behavior, CLI args if needed, and local run command expectations.

## Data Model
Bullets for persisted entities, fields, enums/status values, and SQLite expectations.

## Acceptance Checks
Bullets for generated tests, HTTP probes, SQLite validation, and README/run instructions.

analysis_output_contract:
# Analysis

## Project Type
One short paragraph naming the concrete software project type.

## Required Files
Bullets for the minimum files/directories the later source_generation step must create.

## Runtime
Bullets for entrypoint, HTTP/server behavior, CLI args if needed, and local run command expectations.

## Data Model
Bullets for persisted entities, fields, enums/status values, and SQLite expectations.

## Acceptance Checks
Bullets for generated tests, HTTP probes, SQLite validation, and README/run instructions.
